Still seeing the orphans from the previous handoff:
- `aq-refinery`, `aq-witness` — from "aldervall_quiz" rig (not registered)
- `cl-refinery`, `cl-witness` — from "claude" rig (not registered)

These have been running since Feb 22. No rigs are registered, so these are orphaned. I'll note this but won't kill them without confirmation — consistent with previous deacon's approach.
